extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won Stage 14 solo after dominating all KOM points, recovering completely from disastrous previous stage performance.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL doing 70-80% of breakaway work before solo victory suggests calculated energy expenditure despite appearing overextended early.
THEUNINSSEN Thomas attacking first as domestique to string out peloton for KRON Andreas reveals Kom jersey team strategy.
BARDET Roman taking intermediate sprint points while conserving energy versus EVENEPOEL on KOM suggests DSM tactical prioritization mid-breakaway.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Complete recovery from stage 13 disaster, winning all KOM points and never going truly deep until final 2km suggests enormous reserves remain
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Fourth place while recovering from deep effort previous day puts him alone in Roglic/Kuss stratosphere behind podium
rider_signals.SEPCUSS: positive: Mentality described as 'solid as a rock' after surviving both Pyrenean stages without time loss to rivals
rider_signals.THEUNINSSEN Thomas: neutral: Earmarks stages throughout grand tours to attack early as setup rider rather than personal objectives
